series_metadata.series_description: Permanent Agreements are contracts between agencies and the Ohio Department of Education outlining specific rights and regulations relative to USDA Child Nutrition Programs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain permanent agreement until it is superseded. If an agency is terminated for cause, retain until removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or until any outstanding debt is paid to USDA; if an appeal is filed then transfer to appeal file. ; Electronic: Retain permanent agreement until it is superseded. If an agency is terminated for cause, retain until removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or until any outstanding debt is paid to USDA; if an appeal is filed then transfer to appeal file., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
